final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey) reimagined as a 1990s Hong Kong cinema classic.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography with heavy grain, 90s Hong Kong wuxia romance aesthetic, Shaw Brothers-inspired color grading, cinematic still
Composition: wide establishing shot, eye-level perspective, 50mm lens, deep focus with foreground kiss and background figures
Subject: 至尊宝 (Zhi Zun Bao / Monkey King) and 紫霞 (Zi Xia) embracing and kissing on ancient city wall, period costumes with flowing robes and hair
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese fortress wall at sunset, distant figures of 牛魔王 (Bull Demon King) and 唐僧 (Tang Monk) standing apart, silhouetted against the sky
Lighting/mood: golden hour backlighting, warm romantic glow on the couple, dramatic rim light, melancholic yet epic atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and gold tones for the sunset, rich reds and oranges in costumes, cool blue shadows in background
Materials/textures: visible film grain throughout, slightly soft focus on distant figures, textured stone wall surface
Text (verbatim): "大话西游"
Constraints: must evoke 1990s Hong Kong cinema nostalgia; all character names must be recognizable in period-accurate costumes
Avoid: modern digital clean look; oversaturated colors; deformed hands; watermark; 8K stuffer aesthetic
